titleStmt.title: SII 30.193: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 193. (A.R. No. 269 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, (Pudūr) Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Rudrakōṭīśvara temple-on the west and north wall of the central shrine Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa I: Year 21: 1091 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the praśasti of the king Pugaḻ sūḻnta puṇari etc. It records the exemption of taxes for the dēvadāna lands of Sri Rudrasōlai-mahādēva by the sabhā of Dinachintāmaṉi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Dāmar-nāḍu, a sub-division of Dāmark-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkonḍasōla-maṇḍalam.

The dēvadāna lands were located in twelve different places, purchased in the 12th, 14th and 21st years of the king, from twelve different persons. The boundaries of the lands and measurements were mentioned in detail. Among the boundries of the land, a parcel of land owned by the medicine man, Tiruvikrama bhaṭṭaṉ as vaidya-bhōgam is found mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyiṟ ponṉemiyaḷavu (t)enṉemi
naṭappa viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu vikkiramat toḻilāl ma
ṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kontaḷa varaicar tantaḷami
riya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttikkīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai
vākai cūṭit teṉṟicai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉ niyāṭai naṉnila
p pāvai taṉimaiyun=tavittup paṇitta tirumaṇi makuṭa murimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi yira
ṇṭun=taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnilaven=tar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅ
kol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunila viḷākam meṅkaṇun=ta ṉātu tiruniḻalveṇṇilā pāṟpatuma
n tikaḻa Orutanimeruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūvar tiṟaiviṭutta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai
niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉnavaṉ karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat taṉ poṉ nakarpuṟattiṭaik kiṭappa viṉ
nāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipola Ippiḻaiyeṉṟaṅku colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā
vikkalaṉ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇṇaracar naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiriyaḷavunturatti veṅkaṇum paṭaiveṅka
ḷiṟu viṭṭatanmānamuṅ kūṟiya vīramuṅ kiṭappāṟiṉa malaikaḷum mutukuneḷippa Iḻin=tanetikaḷum
cuḻaṉṟuṭainn=toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷun=talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait taṉ nāḷukan=tatāṟu nun=tāṉaiyum pa
ṉnāḷiṭṭam palapala mutukum payan=tetir māṟiya cayapperun=tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiṉ celvi
yum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭan=tayariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇa me
ṉnum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat ti
ruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaṟāvaru parittalaṅkaḷum porukarit talaṅkaḷum tan=tiravāriyu muṭaittāy vaṭa
kaṭal teṉkaṭalāvatu polat taṇperuñceṇaiyai Ēvippañcavaraiyā poruta porkkaḷatta
ñci veruu neḷittoṭi Araṇeṉap pukkakāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭṭiṭaippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai
vaṉacararākkiyum poṟcai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum
muttamiḻp potiyilum veṅkaripaṭu mayyac caiyyamum kaṉniyum kaikkoṇṭaruḷit teṉnāṭṭava
viṭucāveṟellām taṉivicumpeṟamā veṟiyataṉ varutaṉit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaik koṭṭāṟuṭ
paṭa neṟikaṭoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟai koḷāramun=tirup puyattalaṅkalum poliya vīramum tiyākamum
viḷaṅkap pārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyeṉat tinacin=tāmaṇipuvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai
vīṟṟirun=tataṉa maṅkayar tilakam Ēḻicai valli Eḻulakuṭaiyāḷ yiruppa Ūḻipuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m vīrasiṁhāsanattu vīṟṟirun=taruḷina kovirājakesaripanmarāna śakra varttikaḷ kulottuṅkaco
ḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tāmark koṭṭattut tāmar nāṭṭu
c tinacin=tāmaṇic caruppeti maṅkalattu śrīrudracolai mahātevar Ātitāsa caṇṭeśvaraṟku Ivvūr brāhmaṇan kaā
śyapan nampi tāmotirak kiramavittaṉ viṟṟa nilam vaṭakaḻani rājamallapperuvatikku meṟku ve
kkāvukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟut taṭi 2 ṉāṟ kuḻi Añnūṟṟoru(m)patukkuk kiḻpāṟ kel
lai ciṟukuḷattūr meṟkum teṉpārkkellai co
ḻa pāṇṭiyap perāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai śrī kayilāsamuṭaiya mahātevar teva
tānattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Iṉnāṉkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa bhūmi taṭi Ira
ṇṭināṟ kuḻi Añnūṟṟorupatum Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu pākkattu śrīpontaikkiramavittaṉ pakkal koṇṭuṭai
ya bhūmi Iṅkey rājamallap peruvatikkuk kiḻakku vekkāvukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu taṭi 2 nā
ṟ kuḻi nānūṟṟaimpattu cciṉnattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai kollai nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai śrīkayilāsamu
ṭaiyār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai perumaṇṭapattu mahāviṣṇukkaḷ tevatānattukkuk kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai śrīpontaikkiramavittaṉ bhūmikkut teṟkum Innāṉkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa bhūmi taṭi 2 nāṟ kuḻi
nānūṟṟaimpattuc cinnamum Iṅke meṟpaṭiyār pakkal koṇṭuṭaiya bhūmi Ikkaṇṇāṟṟu kuḻi nūṟṟaimpattuc cinnattukkuk ki
ḻpāṟkellai śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyār tevatānattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai Ittevar tirumuṟṟattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pātirit tirukkatavakkiramavittan bhūmik
kut teṟkum Innāṉkellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa bhūmi kuḻi nūṟṟaimpattuc cinnamum Ākakkuḻi Aṟunūṟṟuc cinnamum kam
piṉpaṭi mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅkavum Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu naṟaiyāmaṇṭaya bhaṭṭaṉ pak
kal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam Iṅkey vekkāvu
kkut teṟku Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟuttaṭi 2 nāṟ kuḻi Annū
ṟṟuc cinnattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai muṭakku vāykkālukku
meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai coḻapāṇṭiya vāykkālukku va
ṭakkum melpāṟkellai paṟiyalūr narasimhatevabhaṭṭan bhūmi
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum
Innāṉkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa bhūmi taṭi 2 nāṟkuḻi An
nūṟṟuc cinnamum muṉpu paṟiyalūrk kāmakkoṭik kiramavittaṉ pakka
l vilai koṇṭuṭaiya bhūmi Iṅke rājamallap peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakku ve
kkāvukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟuk kāmakkoṭik kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu muppattuc cinnattukkuk ki
ḻpārkkellai vayijyan tiruvikkarama bhaṭṭaṉ vayijyapokattukku meṟkum te
ṉ pārkkellai puṟakkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai niroṭu vāykkā
lukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku teṟkum
Innāṉkellai Uḷḷu naṭuvupaṭṭa bhūmi kuḻi munnūṟṟu muppattu ccinnamu
m Iṅke viṭṭu kiḻakkum pākkattu śrīkatampa bhaṭṭasarvak kirituyājiyār Itte
vaṟkuk kuṭutta bhūmikku kiḻpāṟkellai śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyār tevatānattukku
meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ittevar tevatāṉattukkum śrīrudracolai mahā
tevar tevatānattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pātirit tirukkata vakkiramavit
taṉ bhūmikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟku In
nāṉkellai Uḷḷu naṭuvupaṭṭa bhūmi kuḻi nūṟṟeḻupattuc cinnamum Inkey vek
kāvukku vaṭakkup puṟakaṇṭattup pākkattu mutta Ātivarāka bhaṭṭan kuṭutta bhūmikkuk
kiḻpāṟkellai śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyār devatānattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ
kellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tiruppaṭakkā
ṭuṭaiyār devatānattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkā
lukkut teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa bhūmi kuḻi nūṟṟu nāṟpatum Ip
pūmikkut teṟkaṭaiyavum vaṭakkaṭaiyavum Uḷḷameṭu kuḻi Aṟupatum Ākak ku
ḻi 2 100 ṟum Ākakkuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu munnūṟṟuc cinnaṅ kuḻiyum kampiṉpaṭi mi
kutik kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka kallilum cempilum kulottuṅka coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 2 jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmaṟ koṭṭattu tāmaṟnāṭṭut tiṉacintāmaṇic catuppe
ti maṅkalattu mahāsahaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷ Eḻuttu nammūr śrīuruttiracolai mahā
tevar tevarkaṉmikaḷ kaṇṭu Ittevar Ātidāsa caṇṭeśvaraṟkuttamaco
ḻaccerik kūṭalūr cikumāra cokiyār brāhmaṇi Eḻuvaraṭiyāḷ cāni stritaṉattāl
Uṭaiyārum kaṭaittāka kūṭalūr cikumāra cokiyārai mutukaṇṇākak koṇṭu vilai ni
lamāvatu kun=tavaip pererikiḻ Aṭikaḷ vāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu
taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāṟ kuḻi nānūṟṟu Orupattuc cinnaṅkuḻiyum kaḷameṭum Itaṉvaṭakku nālāṅka
ṇṇāṟṟu kuḻi Aṟupattuc cinnaṅkuḻiyum Iṅke muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu tiruvaraṅka kramavitta
n brāhmaṇi tiruvaraṅkaccina pātirit tiruppontai somayājiyār makaṉ kecuva
ṉai mutukaṇṇāka koṇṭu viṟṟa Irunūṟum Apimānamerucceric ciṟukuḷattūṟ Āḷayaka krama
vittanum Ivan tampi tiruppontaiyār comay[ājiyā*]rum Ivarkaḷ pakkal koṇṭa pūmi rājaval
lip peruvatikku meṟku vekkāvukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu vilai koṇṭa kuḻi nū
ṟṟut toṇṇūṟum Itaṉ teṟkuk kuṭiyirukkai kuḻi Aṟupatum Āka vilai koṇṭa kuḻi toḷāyirattu Irupatum kaḷameṭum Iṟaiyili Ākat
tantom Iva
rkaḷ Ilakṣaṇappaṭi Iṟaiyiliyāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka veṉṟu sabhaiyuḷḷeḻuntu paṇittār maṇaṟppākkattu tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ sahasran naṟaiyūr Āṉantakkiramavittanum pāṭakattu tirucālai sahasraṉum paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutinenyivūr karanattān panaṅkāṭaṉ kuḻañcān Ivai
Enneḻuttu Itil kuṟai tirumāḷikai mel catirattile kaṇṭu koḷka .
Digital edition of SII 30.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
